content:
I'm preparing for ultrawork mode and need to understand this workspace's purpose and structure. This is exploratory reconnaissance — I'll use findings to identify which files and directories are relevant for future tasks. Find: 1) Primary purpose of this project (package.json, README, etc.), 2) Overall directory structure, 3) Key source directories, 4) Configuration files (tsconfig, build configs, etc.), 5) Any existing `.sisyphus` plans or work artifacts. Return file paths with brief descriptions. Focus on root and src/ directories.
<!-- OMO_INTERNAL_INITIATOR -->
